articles.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
articles.preview: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.
articles.full_text: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.
articles.meta_description: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes

articles.title: Indian payments chief thinks AI will be heavily involved in next era of digital payment growth
articles.preview: Dilip Asbe said that newer UPI apps could be more competitive with a viable commercial model

articles.title: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant, Moscow fuel hub
articles.preview: The two attacks, in Volgograd and Vladimir regions, are part of President Zelenskyy's strategy to bring the war to the Russian people and force Putin into peace negotiations.
articles.full_text: The two attacks, in Volgograd and Vladimir regions, are part of President Zelenskyy's strategy to bring the war to the Russian people and force Putin into peace negotiations.
articles.meta_description: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant, Moscow fuel hub
